auth_error_too_many_attempts: You entered too many incorrect codes. Request a new one to continue.

auth_error_resend_verification_failed: We could not resend the verification code. Try again in a few minutes.
auth_error_unexpected: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.
auth_error_email_not_verified: Your email is not yet verified. Enter the code we just sent you.
auth_error_verify_first: You need to create your account or sign in again to verify your email.

auth_invitation_use_invited_email: Use the email address that received the invitation to continue.
auth_invitation_subtitle: Review this invitation before joining the organization in Rift.
auth_invitation_success_description: You have successfully joined the organization. Redirecting to your workspace…
auth_invitation_invited_to_label: You have been invited to join
auth_error_invalid_or_expired_code: That code is invalid or expired. Request a new one and try again.
auth_error_verified_but_sign_in_failed: Your email is verified, but we could not sign you in automatically.
auth_error_mfa_invalid_code: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app to continue.
auth_error_mfa_invalid_or_expired: That authenticator code is invalid or expired. Try again.

auth_forgot_error_no_email_resend: We could not find the email to resend the code. Try again.

common_enter_6_digits: Enter the 6-digit code we sent you by email.

common_password_min_length: Password must be at least {count} characters.
common_password_reset_description: Choose a new password to recover your account.
chat_mode_study_enforced_by_org_title: Study Mode is enforced by your organization
chat_mode_study_requires_thread_title: Send your first message to create a thread, then you can toggle Study Mode.
chat_prompt_drop_hint_upload_description: Release to attach them to this message.
Release to attach them to this message too.
chat_prompt_drop_hint_limit_description: Remove one file first to upload more.
chat_prompt_drop_hint_locked_description: Upgrade to attach files in chat.
chat_prompt_attachment_upload_failed_ari: Upload failed for {fileName}. Click to remove.
chat_sidebar_description: Chat with your data and get answers to your questions with AI.
chat_sidebar_upgrade_description: Get file uploads, full model access, and more monthly usage for your workspace.
chat_sidebar_status_error_description: Something went wrong and the response could not be generated.
chat_sidebar_status_generating_descripti: The AI has started generating the response.
chat_sidebar_status_pending_description: This chat is queued; a response will be generated shortly.
chat_search_dialog_description: Search your threads and jump directly to matching messages.
chat_search_empty_idle: Type a thread title or message text.
chat_welcome_subtitle: What would you like to explore?
chat_welcome_suggestion_1_prompt: Explain the concept of dark matter and its effects on the universe
chat_welcome_suggestion_2_prompt: Can you explain the P vs NP problem and potential solutions?
chat_welcome_suggestion_3_prompt: What are the greatest mathematical conjectures still waiting to be proven?
chat_welcome_suggestion_4_prompt: How does the immune system protect the body from disease?
chat_welcome_suggestion_5_prompt: What determines the lifecycle and death of stars?
chat_welcome_suggestion_6_prompt: What factors drive long-term economic growth and development?
layout_organization_create_error_limit: You can create up to {max} organizations.
org_byok_api_key_help_prefix: You can get your {providerName} API key
org_byok_feature_disabled_help: This feature is currently disabled. Contact your administrator to enable it.
org_byok_page_description: Manage your organization's API keys for AI providers (Bring Your Own Key). Keys are encrypted.
org_byok_provider_configured_description: Configured, new requests for this provider will use your org key.
org_byok_provider_not_configured_descrip: Not configured, requests will continue using RIFT.
org_byok_zdr_dialog_description: Your organization requires ZDR right now. Saving a {providerName} API key will turn off ZDR enforcement for {providerName} requests that use your org key. Other providers keep their current ZDR behavior.
org_compliance_flag_enforce_study_mode_d: Force organization chat requests to use Study Mode and lock the toggle.
org_compliance_flag_enforce_study_mode_h: Applies immediately to new chat requests.
org_compliance_flag_require_org_provider: Only allow models from providers that have an active organization API key.
org_compliance_flag_require_zdr_descript: Only allow models from AI providers that do not retain data. This is enforced at the provider level.
org_compliance_flags_description: Organization-level AI rules for provider access, ZDR, and enforced modes.
org_compliance_flags_help: These rules take effect immediately and can change which models or requests are available.
org_compliance_page_description: Configure organization-level AI rules and access policies.
org_analytics_page_description: Analytics are for your organization's internal admin use only. They are not shared with Rift or any external parties and do not expose any user private data.
org_analytics_section_description: Control extraction-based analytics derived from users' AI requests.
org_analytics_topic_extraction_descripti: Extract and analyze topics from usage data.
org_analytics_sentiment_emotion_descript: Extract sentiment and emotion signals from usage data.
org_analytics_intention_extraction_descr: Extract and analyze user intentions from usage data.
org_route_select_org_analytics_descripti: Switch to an organization to manage analytics settings.
org_route_select_org_security_descriptio: Switch to an organization to manage organization-level security settings.
org_security_coming_soon: Organization security settings are coming soon.
org_security_contact_help: This feature is only available via Add-on or Enterprise plan.
org_security_coming_soon_self_serve: This feature will be available soon for self serve.
org_security_page_description: Configure organization-level security and access controls.
org_security_domains_description: Verify ownership of your email domain to enable Single Sign-On.
org_security_domains_status_empty: You haven't added any verified domains yet.
org_security_sso_description: Require all team members to authenticate via your identity provider.
org_security_sso_status_empty: You haven't set up Single Sign-On yet.
org_security_sso_domain_help: Your email domain must be verified to set up Single Sign-On.
org_security_directory_description: Automatically provision and deprovision accounts via your identity provider.
org_security_directory_status_empty: You haven't set up a directory yet.
org_model_controls_description: Override model availability per model. Disabled by provider or compliance policy is shown in the description.
org_model_controls_help: Changes apply immediately. You can override a provider-level denial per model here.
org_models_page_description: Manage providers and models for your organization.
org_tools_page_description: Manage built-in, external, and provider tools for your organization.
org_tool_access_description: Control whether provider-native and external tools can be used in this organization.
org_tool_access_help: When disabled, tools are blocked server-side. Users cannot re-enable them from thread preferences.
org_built_in_tools_toggle_description: Turn this off to block built-in tools like web search and code execution across the organization.
org_provider_tools_description: Enable or disable exact provider-native tools for this organization.
org_provider_tools_help: These toggles are enforced server-side. A disabled tool cannot be re-enabled by thread preferences.
org_external_tools_toggle_description: Turn this off to block external integrations such as sandbox, MCP, or similar across the organization.
org_provider_controls_description: Enable or disable AI providers for your organization.
org_provider_controls_help: Changes apply immediately. Disabled providers and their models are unavailable to the organization.
tool_description_web_search: Search the web and return grounded sources.
tool_description_web_fetch: Retrieve and summarize content from web pages and PDFs.
tool_description_x_search: Search posts and threads on X.
tool_description_code_interpreter: Run code to analyze data and compute results.
tool_description_google_search: Search the web with Google grounding.
tool_description_url_context: Open URLs from the prompt and reason over their contents.
tool_description_code_execution: Run code in a sandbox for calculations and data tasks.
tool_description_view_image: Open and inspect image inputs as a tool step.
tool_description_view_x_video: Open and inspect videos linked from X.
tool_description_web_search_dynamic: Search the web and return grounded sources with dynamic filtering. Requires Anthropic code execution.
tool_description_web_fetch_dynamic: Retrieve and summarize web content with dynamic filtering.
org_provider_models_description: Enable or disable models for this provider in your organization.
org_provider_models_help: Changes apply immediately. Disabled models are unavailable to the organization.
org_provider_models_none_available: No models available for this provider.
org_provider_policy_page_description: Configure provider and model restrictions and compliance flags for your organization.
org_route_select_org_body: Select an organization in the sidebar or switch context to manage policies.
org_route_select_org_compliance_descript: Switch to an organization to manage organization-level compliance policies.
org_route_select_org_provider_models_des: Switch to an organization to manage organization-level provider and model policies.
org_route_select_org_tools_description: Switch to an organization to manage organization-level tool policies.
org_billing_sidebar_over_seat_descriptio: This member is outside the workspace's paid seat capacity. Upgrade seats or remove members to restore paid usage.
org_settings_general_avatar_description: This is your organization's logo. Click to upload a custom image.
org_settings_general_avatar_help: A logo is optional but helps identify your organization.
org_settings_general_error_sign_in_requi: You need to sign in and select an organization to edit.
org_settings_general_name_description: The display name of your organization.
org_settings_general_page_description: Manage your organization's profile, name, and logo.
org_knowledge_empty_state: No organization knowledge files have been uploaded yet.
org_knowledge_page_description: Upload Markdown or PDF files for your organization's knowledge base.
settings_account_avatar_description: This is your avatar. Click on the avatar to upload a custom image.
settings_account_avatar_help: An avatar is optional but strongly recommended.
settings_account_email_change_requested: Email change request submitted. Check your inbox to finish verification.
settings_account_email_description: This is your account email address.
settings_account_email_help: Use a valid address you can access to complete secure verification.
settings_account_error_email_same: Please enter a different email address.
settings_account_error_sign_in_required_: You need to sign in to update your avatar.
You need to sign in to update your profile.
settings_account_language_help: You can change this at any time.
settings_account_logout_description: Sign out from your current session on this device.
settings_account_logout_error: Unable to sign out. Please try again.
settings_account_logout_help: You can sign back in anytime using your account credentials.
settings_account_name_description: Please enter your full name, or a display name you are comfortable with.
settings_account_page_description: Manage your account details and avatar.
settings_security_login_methods_descript: Review connected sign-in providers and unlink methods you no longer use.
settings_security_login_methods_empty: No connected login methods were found.
settings_security_login_methods_error_la: You must keep at least one login method connected.
settings_security_login_methods_error_co: Unable to connect the selected provider.
settings_security_login_methods_error_lo: Unable to load connected login methods.
settings_security_login_methods_error_un: Unable to unlink the selected login method.
settings_security_login_methods_help_unl: Unlink old or unused providers to reduce account exposure.
settings_security_error_password_mismatc: New password and confirmation do not match.
settings_security_error_password_unchang: New password must be different from your current password.
settings_security_error_sign_in_required: You need to sign in to update your password.
settings_security_form_description: Enter your current password and choose a new one.
settings_security_help_sessions: You will be signed out from other sessions after changing your password.
settings_security_set_password_help: After setting a password, you can sign in with either social login or email and password.
settings_security_page_description: Manage your account password and session security.
settings_security_mfa_backup_codes_descr: Store these one-time recovery codes in a safe place.
settings_security_mfa_backup_codes_warni: Store these codes in a safe place. You won't be able to see them again.
settings_security_mfa_error_verify: Unable to verify the authenticator code.
settings_security_sessions_description: Review where your account is signed in and revoke sessions you do not recognize.
settings_security_sessions_error_revoke_: Unable to revoke the selected session.
settings_security_sessions_help_revoke: Revoke old or unrecognized sessions to keep your account secure.
settings_security_sessions_no_other_sess: No other active sessions to revoke.

chat_attachment_preview_unavailable: Preview is not available for this file type.
auth_mail_otp_ignore: If you did not request this code, you can safely ignore this email.

settings_security_mfa_scan_instructions: Scan this QR code in your authenticator app. If you can't scan it, "copy" the code manually. Then enter the 6-digit code to finish setup.
